headline: Is It Time To Reconsider Medtronic (MDT) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Medtronic is offering fair value at its current price or if the long term story is already fully reflected in the share price, this article walks through the key signals investors tend to watch. The stock last closed at US$86.63, with returns of 1.7% over 1 year, 18.9% over 3 years and a 16.4% decline over 5 years. In the short term, it has seen a 1.2% decline over 7 days and a 10.4% decline over 30 days. Recent news coverage has focused on Medtronic's position...
